threshold_semantics: absolute random-context Dataset-GL bucket energy T; rms_cutoff=sqrt(T); not the relative AGS significance parameter

sampling.law: natural autoregressive continuation conditioned on a real FineWeb context
sampling.target_primary: one_hot(argmax(P_theta^tok(.|X))) after an X-only length-128 forward
sampling.target_secondary: P_theta^tok(.|X) after an X-only length-128 forward

affine.matrix_law: iid uniform entries conditioned on full column rank
affine.anchored_offset_law: one natural rollout X per real context
affine.direction_law: iid uniform nonzero vector over Z_q^n

toy.algorithm: noiseless q-SFT affine bins, singleton detection, and peeling
toy.offsets: zero delay plus the n standard-basis delays
toy.support_law: uniform size-S subset of Z_q^n without replacement
toy.coefficient_law: independent equal-magnitude complex q-th roots of unity
toy.success: exact support, no false positives, and max coefficient error below 1e-6 in every trial
